tests.name: Two to the power of three
Three to the power of four
Two to the power of ten

de.description: Schreibe eine Funktion, die die Potenz berechnet (basis hoch exponent). Implementiere dies ohne die eingebaute pow() Funktion zu nutzen. Nutze stattdessen eine Schleife.
de.hints: Multipliziere die Basis exponent-mal mit sich selbst. Denke daran: n^0 = 1 fuer alle n.
de.name: Potenz berechnen

en.description: Write a function that computes exponentiation (base to the power of exponent). Implement it without using the built-in pow() function. Use a loop instead.
en.hints: Multiply the base by itself exponent times. Remember: n^0 = 1 for all n.
en.name: Calculate Power

tests.name: Two to the power of three
Three to the power of four
Two to the power of ten
